name: Jira + Confluence
summary: Connect Jira issues + Confluence pages (Atlassian Cloud) to your agents.
description: Read/manage Jira issues, sprints, boards; read/search Confluence pages. Enterprise teams run on Jira/Confluence; this brings that work + knowledge into the control center. Uses Atlassian's official Rovo MCP server (GA; remote, OAuth). Cloud only.

requires.label: An Atlassian Cloud site (Jira and/or Confluence) + OAuth
